Title: Implement Core Game Loop
Description: Draw → Play → Fight → Win loop. Every turn, draw one card. Play one card to attack, defend, or cast a spell. Win by reducing opponent's HP to zero or making them run out of cards to draw.

Title: Design Hero Classes
Description: Design six unique hero classes: Necromancer, Warrior, Rogue, Druid, Engineer, Ranger. Each with five unique cards (no duplicates, no filler).

Title: Implement Mana System
Description: Five mana types: Shadow, Steel, Life, Wind, Earth. Each card has one mana type. Mana refills one of each type every turn. No random draws, no mana screw.

Title: Implement Win/Loss Conditions
Description: Win: reduce opponent's HP to 0 OR make them draw from empty deck. Lose: your HP hits 0 OR you draw from empty deck.

Title: Create Tutorial Structure
Description: Five-step tutorial: 1) Draw, 2) Mana, 3) Fight, 4) Deck, 5) Win. Each step ends with a card gift. No buttons, no menus.

Title: Implement AI Opponent
Description: AI plays predictably at first (safe, kind). After 5 wins, learns to block, save big cards, play smart. Never cheats, never has more cards. Gives new card after defeat.

Title: Design Card Progression
Description: Earn one new card after every match (not by grinding or luck). Cards are gifts from the game, representing growth.

Title: Implement Combat System
Description: Visual combat: cards strike, health bars drop, creatures rise from grave. No hidden numbers. Everything visible and intuitive.

Title: Implement Card Reward System
Description: Give one new card as a gift after each tutorial step and after every victory. The card is a symbol of player growth.

Title: Implement Deck Management
Description: No random card draws. Mana refills predictably. Players always have the tools they need but never all at once. Requires planning and flow.
